scripts.mobile:prebuild: cd apps/mobile && pnpm dlx expo prebuild --clean
scripts.mobile:build:dev: cd apps/mobile && pnpm dlx eas-cli build --profile development --platform ios
scripts.mobile:build:preview: cd apps/mobile && pnpm dlx eas-cli build --profile preview --platform ios
scripts.mobile:build:prod: cd apps/mobile && pnpm dlx eas-cli build --profile production --platform ios
scripts.mobile:submit: cd apps/mobile && pnpm dlx eas-cli submit --platform ios --latest
